headline: AXON Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates on Tariff-Driven Margins
summary: Axon raises its 2026 revenue outlook after Q1 sales surge 33.7%, fueled by strong demand for TASER 10, body cameras and AI offerings.

headline: Kennametal Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates on Pricing and Volume
summary: KMT beats Q3 fiscal 2026 estimates as sales jump 22%, margins expand and Earthworks, Energy and Aerospace demand stay strong.

headline: Ingersoll Rand's Dip Doesn't Mean To Pile In
summary: Ingersoll Rand (IR) stock trades near the cheaper end relative to peers, but not enough to warrant a bullish rating given absolute valuation levels. Read the latest analysis here.
